prompt: A candid, photorealistic portrait of a young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long blonde hair"} wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="dark brown leather blazer"}. She is sitting at a table in a {argument name="setting" default="restaurant or wine bar"}, resting her chin on her hand and looking off to the side with {argument name="expression" default="pursed lips"}. In front of her on the white tablecloth are two glasses: a large glass of {argument name="drink" default="red wine"} and a smaller glass of water. The background features brightly lit, modern shelving filled with rows of wine bottles. Warm, ambient lighting, shot on a smartphone.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真的抓拍肖像，主角是一位留着 {argument name="hair color" default="金色长发"} 的年轻女性，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="深棕色皮质西装外套"}。她坐在 {argument name="setting" default="餐厅或酒馆"} 的桌子旁，单手托腮，带着 {argument name="expression" default="抿嘴"} 的表情看向一侧。她面前的白色桌布上放着两个杯子：一大杯 {argument name="drink" default="红酒"} 和一小杯水。背景是明亮且现代的货架，上面摆满了成排的葡萄酒瓶。温暖的环境光，由智能手机拍摄。

breakdown.creativeCore: 酒馆人物抓拍肖像：生成一张照片级逼真的抓拍风格肖像，展示一个人坐在桌旁，桌上有饮品，背景为灯光照亮的货架。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
